results.raw_draft: Redness-prone skin, this one's for you 🌿 SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray keeps you calm and protected, no matter what today throws at you.
results.final_safe_output: Redness-prone skin, this one's for you 🌿 SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray keeps you calm and protected, no matter what today throws at you.

results.raw_draft: Wake up to eczema-free skin every single day ✨ SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray repairs your barrier while you sleep.
flagged_phrases: repairs your barrier while you sleep
results.explanation: "Eczema-free" claims to treat a diagnosable condition — a drug claim. "Repairs your barrier while you sleep" is a structure-function claim cosmetics can't legally make.
results.final_safe_output: Wake up to calmer, happier skin ✨ SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray helps support your skin barrier, morning and night.
